.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 15 to match the target runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 17 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against the default JDK version (likely 11), resulting in bytecode incompatible with the target Java 17 runtime or failing to utilize Java 17 language features if source level is also updated elsewhere.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed optimizations, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to enforce compilation and runtime against JDK 17.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would continue to compile and run against Java 11, failing the migration goal and potentially missing Java 17 specific features or security updates.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version of jackson-databind to rely on the version managed by the Spring Boot parent.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages Jackson dependencies; specifying an old version (2.12.3) would cause dependency conflicts or incompatibilities with Spring Boot 3's managed Jackson version.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Remove the @Autowired annotation from the constructor to align with Spring Boot 3.x conventions where constructor injection is the default.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.before:
@Autowired
    public Bm085MockReader(DeviceInformation deviceInformation, Executor executor, Bmp085DataEventPublisher bmp085DataEventPublisher) {
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.after: public Bm085MockReader(DeviceInformation deviceInformation, Executor executor, Bmp085DataEventPublisher bmp085DataEventPublisher) {

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance and modern Java practices.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to align with Spring Boot 3.x convention of single-constructor auto-wiring.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Remove unused import for @Autowired annotation after its removal from the constructor.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or lack of support for newer features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to enforce compilation and runtime against Java 17.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would still target Java 11, failing to utilize Java 17 features and potentially causing mismatches with dependencies requiring Java 17 (like Spring Boot 3).

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Add custom error messages to Assert.notNull calls for better debugging.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may work but prevents using modern features and is incompatible with the target stack.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to enforce compilation and runtime against Java 17.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would continue to compile and run against Java 11, failing to meet the migration target.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to adopt Spring Boot 3.x default constructor injection behavior.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum version; compiling with Java 8 settings will fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from reactor-core dependency to rely on Spring Boot's managed BOM version.
Remove explicit version from netty-all dependency to rely on Spring Boot's managed BOM version.
